title: Floral Crisp Japanese Tofu Skewers
description: A delicate and visually stunning Japanese dish featuring marinated tofu, crispy on the outside and tender within, served with a side of soured cream and chive dip. Perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Edible flowers
ingredients.notes: such as violas or pansies, for garnish

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sake, mirin, rice vinegar, and sugar to make the marinade.
Add the cubed tofu to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated tofu cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the tofu with sesame oil and season with salt.
Grill the tofu skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Meanwhile, mix the soured cream and chives in a small bowl.
Serve the grilled tofu skewers with the soured cream and chive dip on the side.
Garnish with edible flowers and serve immediately.
